reference_method: manual inspection of official journal and official-video Filipino original automatic captions
limitations: These are Task 01 navigation references, not reviewed final alignments or publication transcript claims.

moments.journal_excerpt: called the impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Zimmerman Duterte to order.
moments.observed_caption: The impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Zimmerman Duterte hereby called to order.

moments.journal_excerpt: Mr. Vinluan. Good afternoon, Attorney Lotoc. Mr. Lotoc. Good afternoon. Sir.
moments.observed_caption: Good afternoon, Attorney Lotoc. Good afternoon, sir.

moments.journal_excerpt: I will show you timestamp 51:07 onwards of the video.
moments.observed_caption: I'll show you time stamp 51-07 ... onwards of the video.

moments.journal_excerpt: With the permission of the Body, the trial was suspended. It was 5:23 p.m. At 5:40 p.m., the trial was resumed.
moments.observed_caption: declares a 15 minute recess. We shall resume at 5:38.
moments.note: The chair announced a target resumption time; the journal records the actual resumption at 5:40 p.m.

moments.journal_excerpt: Counsel for the Prosecutors, Attorney Ligutan, you may proceed with your redirect, if you have any.
moments.observed_caption: Attorney Ligutan you may proceed with your redirect if you have any.

moments.journal_excerpt: declared the impeachment trial adjourned until two o'clock in the afternoon of Wednesday, July 15, 2026.
moments.observed_caption: There being no other business to be taken up by the court ... until 2 p.m. of Wednesday, July 15, 2026.
